content.en:
Wow!

The Son of the Era disappeared, which meant that Ye Tian had passed the anti-heaven level difficulty.

At this time, Ye Tian checked his body, it was very bad, the power of the law of the son of the era remained in his body, and it was destroying his physical body.

Fortunately, Ye Tian's physical body was extremely strong, otherwise he would have collapsed a long time ago.

In addition, Ye Tian's vitality has almost been wiped out by ninety percent, and if it were someone else, he would have been unable to survive for a long time, but as long as Ye Tian has vitality, he will not die, this is the effect of immortal talent.

Before Ye Tian could begin to recover from his injuries, the machine spirit appeared.

This was also the first time Ye Tian had seen the appearance of the machine spirit.

I saw that the machine spirit looked like a middle-aged person, showing green skin and a single horn on its head, which should be born in the shape of a certain race.

The machine spirit looked at Ye Tian and nodded: "You are very good, among the countless geniuses in this universe era, you are the most talented one I have ever seen, and you have walked out of the path of transcending this universe, and you have the potential to transcend the universe." Originally, you had no hope of breaking through the Heaven-Defying difficulty, do you know what the real standard of the Heaven-Defying difficulty is?"

Ye Tian was stunned, and then said, "I don't know." "

The machine spirit explained: "Actually, if the god level wants to break through the anti-heaven level difficulty, he must defeat the son of the epoch at the anti-heaven level difficulty, but this cosmic era has never given birth to such a genius, and then I lowered the standard, but I must also persist for ten minutes." In view of the fact that your potential is very high, it is super ten-star potential, so I took the initiative to lower the bar for you, so that you only need to hold on for one minute. Otherwise, you're bound to die in the Heaven-Defying difficulty!"

When Ye Tian heard this, he suddenly trembled, it turned out that unconsciously, he was almost finished.

Fortunately, the instrument spirit of the Yuan Ancient Hall took a fancy to him and helped him adjust the difficulty of the assessment, otherwise he would definitely not have any hope of breaking through the heaven-defying level difficulty.

"Thank you, Lord Machine!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

"You have potential, the purpose of the Yuangu Palace is to cultivate potential juniors, so naturally you won't die. The machine spirit explained, "It's time to choose your reward." "

Wow!

The void transformed, and Ye Tian found that he had come to a large hall.

Then.

Treasures appear in the air, showing a rich treasure light.

"The treasures and inheritances of the Yuan Ancient Palace are all tailored for individuals, and they are only suitable for personal use, it can be said that every treasure here is not useless, and every treasure and inheritance here are useful to you, you choose one!"

Instrument Spirit Dao.

Ye Tian glanced around, but he didn't know which treasure he should choose, after all, he didn't know these treasures, and choosing one rashly was not conducive to maximizing benefits.

He went through a lot of hardships this time to pass the assessment, if he wasted the opportunity, wouldn't he regret dying?

"Machine Spirit, can you give me a suggestion?"

Ye Tian asked.

The machine spirit was silent for a moment, and then said, "Okay, let me give you a suggestion." According to the way your cosmic epoch is divided, you are now at the peak of the combat power of your god-level supreme-level highness, and if you move forward, you will be the son of the era, and the son of the epoch represents the most demonic genius of the cosmic era, and it is difficult to give birth to one in hundreds of millions of years. It is difficult to give birth to many children of the epoch in an epoch of the universe, and your universe is still very young, and the inheritance is not strong, so it is difficult to give birth to the children of the era. Without an amazing lineage, it will be very difficult for you to step into the Children of the Era, and I will establish that you choose a lineage that suits you. "

"Machine Spirit, which ones are suitable for my anti-heaven inheritance?"

Ye Tian asked again.

With a wave of his hand, three golden books appeared in his hand.

"These three inheritances are all suitable for you, they are all exercises used to improve the level of life, you have traces of life exercises, but they are relatively general, they seem to be fragments, and they have sequelae. However, your talent is good, and most of the sequelae have been removed, but it is very difficult to cultivate to the peak by relying on that incomplete technique, and these three inheritances are the most perfect life inheritance methods that have been researched by countless powers in our cosmic era, suitable for any race. I need to remind you that if you want to pass on any of the exercises, you must swear not to leak them. It's not that the Yuangu Hall is unwilling to pass it on to more people, but this kind of exercise is a law against the sky, and once it is passed on to many people, there will be big trouble. Moreover, other people can't reach the qualifications for cultivation, and passing it on to others is only harmful, not beneficial!"

Instrument Spirit Dao.

Exercises to improve the level of life?

Ye Tian was a little confused, he didn't know what it was.

But with the explanation of the machine spirit, Ye Tian gradually understood what this was.

It turns out that the level of human life is also divided into levels, ordinary mortals are first-order life, emperor-level is second-order life, and god-level is third-order life.

Due to the limitations of the universe, it is difficult to increase the strength of the physical body above the god level, so the powerhouses above the god level in this universe are all third-order lifeforms, and the cosmic gods are pseudo-fourth-order lifeforms.

Pseudo-fourth-order life means that the vitality has reached the fourth order, but the life intensity has not been reached, because the strong people above the god level cannot improve the physical strength, which is a huge defect.

Ye Tian's current physical strength had reached the third-order upper life level, which was not much different from the fourth-order life level.

Once Ye Tian's vitality was raised, his life level would be the real fourth order, not the pseudo fourth order.

The mutilated life level exercise that the machine spirit said, Ye Tian finally understood what it was, it was his immortal unification technique.

This secret technique was obtained by him in the galaxy, and he thought it was an ordinary exercise, but when he came to the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, he did not find that the Supreme Hall of the Terran had such a secret technique.

At that time, he felt that that set of exercises was not simple.

Now I finally know that the Immortal Unification Technique is a life-level exercise, although it is incomplete, but at least it can be cultivated, but in the end, it can only be cultivated to the fourth-order life level.

And the fourth-order life level is not the end, there are also fifth-order life levels above, as well as sixth-order life levels, and so on.

For example, the ultimate limit of the three major inheritances given by the Yuan Gu Temple Instrument Spirit is the seventh-order life level, once this level is reached, the universe will be destroyed, and he will not be destroyed, this is the real eternal immortality.

As for which life level exercise to choose, Ye Tian fell into hesitation.

If it was possible, he wanted to get three doors, but it wasn't possible.

It is impossible for the Yuangu Palace to give him three inheritances, at most he will only give him one, otherwise it will violate the rules of the Yuangu Palace.

After thinking about it for a long time, Ye Tian finally chose one of the exercises.
